JAN: Venam's Ace is Seviper. A dastardly: JAN: Venam's Ace is Seviper. A dastardly snake with the power to tear away hopes and dreams.
In higher echelons of battling they're o: In higher echelons of battling they're often not much of a threat, but it's quite deadly to newcomers. A pleb stomper, if you will.
Not only does Seviper excel offensively,: Not only does Seviper excel offensively, it has a nasty Glare that will cause you some trouble if you're not prepared.

Sound moves especially are boosted, so t: Sound moves especially are boosted, so try to use that to your own advantage! Even early moves like Growl and Howl can be powerful.
